User.title: User
User.description: A user of the fitness app.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

lastActiveDate.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the user was last active.

Workout.title: Workout
Workout.description: A daily workout assigned to a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user this workout belongs to.

date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) this workout is scheduled for.

description.description: A brief description of the workout.

videoUrl.description: A URL to a video demonstrating the workout.

durationMinutes.description: The estimated duration of the workout in minutes.

completed.description: Whether the user has completed this workout.

completedAt.description: When the user completed the workout.

WorkoutCompletion.title: Workout Completion
WorkoutCompletion.description: A record of a user completing a specific workout.

userId.description: The ID of the user who completed the workout.

workoutId.description: The ID of the completed workout.

date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the workout was scheduled for.

completedAt.description: When the user completed the workout.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and their fitness goals.

/workouts/{workoutId}.description: Stores daily workouts assigned to users.

/workout_completions/{completionId}.description: Stores completion records for workouts, separated per user.
